title: helianthemum hirtum var. aureum
intro: Helianthemum hirtum var. aureum is a variety of the rockrose plant, specifically a golden-leaved form of the Helianthemum hirtum species, which is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum hirtum var. aureum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically used in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
